message: test: replace roadmap invalid fixture with realistic malformed example

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 # Roadmap
 
-(missing walking skeleton section, missing iteration list)
+## Walking skeleton (ITER-0000)
+
+This walking skeleton is missing all its required fields — no Intent, no Status, no Stories committed. The section header is present but the body is empty of structured fields.
